/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/smoose_tester.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smoose_tester.dir/mixgraph_workload.cc.o CMakeFiles/smoose_tester.dir/random.cc.o CMakeFiles/smoose_tester.dir/port_posix.cc.o CMakeFiles/smoose_tester.dir/histogram.cc.o CMakeFiles/smoose_tester.dir/persistent_cache_tier.cc.o -o smoose_tester  /home/jeff-wang/LSM-tuning/comparedDBs/MooseLSM/release/librocksdb.a -lpthread -lgflags /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsnappy.so -llz4 -lzstd -luring /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
